case_title: 954 GEARY, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. SAVANNAH WATERS ET AL

DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF 954 GEARY, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP
